description: Scrimba is an online coding-learning platform with interactive courses, career paths, and documentation for programming and AI topics. Its public site and docs focus on education content rather than a broader developer API platform.
summary: Scrimba exposes a public MCP server at `https://scrimba.com/mcp/v2` (also responds at `/mcp`); no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found for developer integrations.
